params.coords: The span to receive the normalized variation coordinates in the range -16384 to 16384.

fields.returns: The number of coordinates written to the span.
fields.summary: Fills a span with the current normalized variation coordinates for the font.

params.coords: The design-space coordinate values, one per variation axis.

fields.summary: Sets the variation coordinates for the font using design-space values.

params.coords: The normalized coordinate values in the range -16384 to 16384, one per variation axis.

fields.summary: Sets the variation coordinates for the font using normalized values.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named variation instance to apply.

fields.summary: Sets the font's variation coordinates to match a named variation instance.

params.variations: The variation axis tag-value pairs to apply.

fields.summary: Sets the font's variation axes using a collection of tag-value pairs.

fields.value: An array of normalized variation coordinates in the range -16384 to 16384, one per axis.
fields.summary: Gets the current normalized variation coordinates for the font.
